rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPHINE STAMPS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Suspend Powers Of Executor Lisa Burleson Peguese Pending Hearing On Petition For Removal Of Executor
rulings.Rulings: continued to january 4, 2017. no file stamped copy of the petition, no file stamped copy of Exhibit A and no proposed order delivered to the examiner. in addition, exhibit A was not filed until a day after the petition, so it has to be treated separately from the petition. the NOH filed says only that a copy of the petition was mailed. it is not clear notice was proper. new deadline for providing copies in order to avoid an automatic continuance is thursday, december 29, 2016.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LEONARD ESPOSTO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Respondents Gayle M. Mazza And Nancy Hill To Compel Further Responses To First Sets Of Form Interrogatories To Contestants And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion to Compel Further Responses to First Set of Form Interrogatories to Contestants and for Monetary Sanctions is granted. Contestants are ordered to provide further amended responses to Form Interrogatories 17.1(b) and 17.1(d) in compliance with CCP Section 2030.220. Sanctions in the amount of reasonable attorney's fees incurred in bringing this motion will be awarded against Contestants' counsel in an amount to be set forth in a declaration filed within a week of the order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 12/20/2016. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order, including a proposed sanctions amount.
